periodic_modal_repair.title: Periodic modal structural discovery
periodic_modal_repair.protected_object: chosen periodic modal coefficient or protected functional
periodic_modal_repair.disturbance_description: unseen modal content or fully unresolved divergence-only ambiguity
periodic_modal_repair.current_failure_summary: The current periodic record does not resolve every mode used by the protected target.
periodic_modal_repair.missing_structure: Retain the full protected modal support in the record, or weaken the target to the currently visible support.
failure_modes: retained cutoff misses part of the protected modal support

recommendations.title: Raise cutoff to 4
recommendations.rationale: The protected-support threshold law on the tested modal family says the retained cutoff must include every mode used by the protected variable.
recommendations.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with repeated falsification

recommendations.title: Weaken target to leading modal coefficient
recommendations.rationale: The current retained support already resolves this weaker periodic target exactly.
recommendations.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with repeated falsification

chosen_fix.title: Raise cutoff to 4
chosen_fix.rationale: The protected-support threshold law on the tested modal family says the retained cutoff must include every mode used by the protected variable.
chosen_fix.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with repeated falsification

comparison.narrative: The proposed periodic augmentation restores the missing protected modal support and moves the example into the exact branch.

limitations: protected-support thresholds are family-specific rather than universal PDE laws

control_history_repair.title: Diagonal control structural discovery
control_history_repair.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with interpolation checks
control_history_repair.protected_object: chosen protected functional on a diagonal control family
control_history_repair.disturbance_description: unresolved hidden functional components under the current history length and sensor profile
control_history_repair.current_failure_summary: The current history is too short for exact interpolation of the chosen protected functional.
control_history_repair.missing_structure: Add more history or weaken the target to a functional generated by the active moment family.
failure_modes: finite observation horizon is too short to interpolate the protected functional

recommendations.title: Increase horizon to 3
recommendations.rationale: On the tested diagonal family, exact recovery begins once the history is long enough to interpolate the protected functional on the active sensor spectrum.
recommendations.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with interpolation checks

recommendations.title: Weaken target to sensor-weighted state sum
recommendations.rationale: This weaker functional is already generated by the current history length and sensor profile.
recommendations.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with interpolation checks

chosen_fix.title: Increase horizon to 3
chosen_fix.rationale: On the tested diagonal family, exact recovery begins once the history is long enough to interpolate the protected functional on the active sensor spectrum.
chosen_fix.theorem_status: family-specific threshold result with interpolation checks

comparison.narrative: The proposed history augmentation reaches the first exact interpolation horizon for the current protected functional.

limitations: history threshold law is currently family-specific rather than a general observer theorem

weaker_vs_stronger_split.title: Qubit weaker-versus-stronger structural discovery
weaker_vs_stronger_split.observation_label: fixed-basis record with phase window 30.0 degrees
weaker_vs_stronger_split.protected_object: chosen qubit protected variable under a fixed-basis classical record
weaker_vs_stronger_split.disturbance_description: phase-sensitive information lost under the fixed-basis measurement map
weaker_vs_stronger_split.current_failure_summary: The current fixed-basis record collapses phase-sensitive Bloch information.
weaker_vs_stronger_split.missing_structure: Either add a complementary basis or weaken the target to the phase-insensitive z coordinate.
failure_modes: phase freedom creates record fibers with different Bloch vectors and the same fixed-basis statistics

recommendations.title: Weaken target to z coordinate only
recommendations.rationale: Under the fixed-basis record, the z coordinate survives exactly even when the full Bloch vector does not.

recommendations.title: Add a complementary measurement basis
recommendations.rationale: This is the standard physical way to recover phase-sensitive information, but the repo does not yet prove a theorem for the richer basis family.
recommendations.theorem_status: standard heuristic outside the current theorem spine
recommendations.expected_regime: likely exact on the enlarged family

chosen_fix.title: Weaken target to z coordinate only
chosen_fix.rationale: Under the fixed-basis record, the z coordinate survives exactly even when the full Bloch vector does not.

comparison.narrative: Weakening the target removes the phase-sensitive degrees of freedom that the fixed-basis record cannot resolve.

limitations: complementary-basis recommendation is standard physical guidance, not yet a repo theorem

restricted_linear_measurement_repair.title: Restricted-linear structural discovery
restricted_linear_measurement_repair.protected_object: chosen protected row family Lx on a finite restricted linear state family
restricted_linear_measurement_repair.disturbance_description: state differences that remain invisible to the active record rows
restricted_linear_measurement_repair.current_failure_summary: Exact recovery is blocked because the current measurement rows do not span the protected row family.
restricted_linear_measurement_repair.missing_structure: Add measurement rows that span the unrecoverable protected rows.
failure_modes: nullspace witness changes the protected target while leaving the record fixed
protected row space is not contained in the active observation row space

recommendations.title: Add minimal measurement set
recommendations.rationale: These added rows are the smallest candidate-library augmentation that makes the protected row space observable on the restricted family.

recommendations.title: Add minimal measurement set
recommendations.rationale: These added rows are the smallest candidate-library augmentation that makes the protected row space observable on the restricted family.

recommendations.title: Add minimal measurement set
recommendations.rationale: These added rows are the smallest candidate-library augmentation that makes the protected row space observable on the restricted family.

recommendations.title: Weaken target to sum x2+x3
recommendations.rationale: The current record already supports this weaker protected target exactly, so weakening the target is a real structural option rather than a cosmetic fallback.

chosen_fix.title: Add minimal measurement set
chosen_fix.rationale: These added rows are the smallest candidate-library augmentation that makes the protected row space observable on the restricted family.

comparison.narrative: The proposed augmentation removes the protected-variable-changing nullspace witness and moves the restricted family into the exact regime.

limitations: candidate-library augmentation is exact only inside the provided row library
